title: Platform Hygiene — Remove legacy points UI
description: Epic E-03. Complete removal of all legacy points system UI from the frontend. Scope is strictly frontend: UI elements, navigation references, and routes/redirects. Backend (database tables, models, services, controllers, API response fields) is left intact for future cleanup. The platform is not yet live, so no user data migration is needed. Features: remove all points UI from all pages (F-11.1); remove points navigation links (F-11.2); redirect former points URLs to appropriate existing pages (F-11.3); remove points references from shared components (F-11.4); investigate and disable any background processes referencing points (F-11.5).

pre_conditions: Platform is not yet live — no user point balances exist that require migration or communication
Points-related backend code (models, services, DB schema, API controllers) exists and must not be touched
post_conditions: F-11.1: No UI element referencing points, point balances, point earning, or point redemption is visible to any actor on any screen
F-11.2: No navigation element in any sidebar, menu, or breadcrumb references points — includes MyPageSideBar.jsx and layout navigation
F-11.3: URLs previously associated with the points system redirect to appropriate existing pages; no points content rendered at those URLs
F-11.4: Shared components (Navbar, AdminNavbar, MyPageSideBar, user profiles, dashboards) contain no points-related content, badges, counters, or labels
F-11.5: Investigation of background processes (emails, notifications, scheduled jobs) referencing points is complete; any found are disabled within this milestone scope
invariants: Backend code (database tables, models, services, controllers, API response fields) for points must NOT be modified — frontend-only scope enforced by this contract's forbidden list
No user data migration is required — platform is not yet live; do not add any migration files

acceptance: Zero points-related UI elements visible on any page for any actor (Student, Teacher, Admin, Guest)
Zero points-related navigation links in any sidebar or menu
Former points URLs redirect to appropriate pages (no 404 or points content rendered)
Investigation of background processes completed and documented; any found are disabled

convergence_checks.description: No legacy points nav link in AdminNavbar (F-11.4)
No legacy points nav link in Navbar (F-11.4)
No legacy points nav in MyPageSideBar (F-11.2)
No legacy points UI in StudentsTable (F-11.1)
No legacy reward points UI in Exams/Create — exam scoring 'points' fields are allowed (F-11.1)
No legacy reward points UI in Exams/Result — exam total_points fields are allowed (F-11.1)
